cases.description: Landing page request triggers the skill
cases.prompt: build me a landing page for our new developer tool
expectations: Commits to a specific aesthetic direction before coding (brutalist / maximalist / editorial / etc.)
Avoids generic fonts (Arial, Inter, Roboto) unless intentionally ironic
Produces production-grade HTML/CSS with at least one high-impact animation moment

cases.description: Dashboard styling request triggers the skill
cases.prompt: beautify this admin dashboard — right now it looks like bootstrap defaults
expectations: Identifies the current generic aesthetic and commits to an alternative direction
Applies distinctive typography and color system

cases.description: React component build triggers the skill
cases.prompt: make a React hero section with a clear design point-of-view
expectations: Produces a functional React component (JSX/TSX) with refined styling
Uses Motion library or CSS animations for micro-interactions where appropriate
Avoids generic AI aesthetics (no purple gradients on white by default)

cases.description: Slide deck request does NOT trigger frontend-design
cases.prompt: create a 10-slide pitch deck for investors
expectations: Routes to codi-content-factory or codi-pptx instead

cases.description: Static poster art does NOT trigger frontend-design
cases.prompt: design a concert poster for a jazz trio
expectations: Does NOT produce a web component
